channel.title: My Car Story With Lou Page
channel.description: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: One Car. One Legend. 1938 Packard Sedanca deVille Super Eight
item.description: Timeless craftsmanship and pre‑war elegance define the 1938 Packard Sedanca deVille Super Eight. This legendary machine embodies luxury, power, and history in motion. What’s the most unforgettable pre‑war classic you’ve ever seen?

media:content.media:title: One Car. One Legend. 1938 Packard Sedanca deVille Super Eight
media:content.media:description: Timeless craftsmanship and pre‑war elegance define the 1938 Packard Sedanca deVille Super Eight. This legendary machine embodies luxury, power, and history in motion. What’s the most unforgettable pre‑war classic you’ve ever seen?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1965 Corvette Stingray — Unleash the Legend
item.description: The 1965 Stingray embodies Corvette’s golden era — sleek, powerful, and unforgettable. What’s the ultimate Stingray year in your opinion?

media:content.media:title: 1965 Corvette Stingray — Unleash the Legend
media:content.media:description: The 1965 Stingray embodies Corvette’s golden era — sleek, powerful, and unforgettable. What’s the ultimate Stingray year in your opinion?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1970 Chrysler 300H Hurst
item.description: A limited‑production legend — the 1970 Chrysler 300H Hurst blends luxury with muscle in unforgettable fashion. Do you think Chrysler’s muscle cars get enough recognition?

media:content.media:title: 1970 Chrysler 300H Hurst
media:content.media:description: A limited‑production legend — the 1970 Chrysler 300H Hurst blends luxury with muscle in unforgettable fashion. Do you think Chrysler’s muscle cars get enough recognition?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1970 Plymouth Sport Fury GT!
item.description: Muscle meets style in the 1970 Sport Fury GT — a rare Mopar that commands attention. Which Mopar muscle car tops your list?

media:content.media:title: 1970 Plymouth Sport Fury GT!
media:content.media:description: Muscle meets style in the 1970 Sport Fury GT — a rare Mopar that commands attention. Which Mopar muscle car tops your list?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: Even a Classy Glove Box! | 1958 Cadillac Eldorado Brougham
item.description: From the glove box to the fins, the 1958 Eldorado Brougham proves Cadillac thought of everything. What’s the most surprising detail you’ve found in a classic car?

media:content.media:title: Even a Classy Glove Box! | 1958 Cadillac Eldorado Brougham
media:content.media:description: From the glove box to the fins, the 1958 Eldorado Brougham proves Cadillac thought of everything. What’s the most surprising detail you’ve found in a classic car?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: The 1949 Cadillac Convertible Experience
item.description: Step into post‑war luxury with the 1949 Cadillac Convertible — a symbol of style and innovation. What’s the most luxurious convertible you’ve seen?

media:content.media:title: The 1949 Cadillac Convertible Experience
media:content.media:description: Step into post‑war luxury with the 1949 Cadillac Convertible — a symbol of style and innovation. What’s the most luxurious convertible you’ve seen?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: Burgundy Blast: The 1965 Riviera
item.description: A 1965 Buick Riviera in deep burgundy — sleek lines and bold presence define this head‑turning classic. What’s your favorite Riviera generation?

media:content.media:title: Burgundy Blast: The 1965 Riviera
media:content.media:description: A 1965 Buick Riviera in deep burgundy — sleek lines and bold presence define this head‑turning classic. What’s your favorite Riviera generation?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: Sporty, Unique & a Head‑Turner | 2004 Chevy SSR
item.description: Part pickup, part roadster — the 2004 Chevy SSR is a quirky blend of style and utility. Do you think the SSR was ahead of its time?

media:content.media:title: Sporty, Unique & a Head‑Turner | 2004 Chevy SSR
media:content.media:description: Part pickup, part roadster — the 2004 Chevy SSR is a quirky blend of style and utility. Do you think the SSR was ahead of its time?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: Revving Up Nostalgia | Vintage 1967 Chevy Corvette in Action!
item.description: The roar of a 1967 Corvette brings back pure muscle car nostalgia. What’s the most unforgettable sound in classic motoring?

media:content.media:title: Revving Up Nostalgia | Vintage 1967 Chevy Corvette in Action!
media:content.media:description: The roar of a 1967 Corvette brings back pure muscle car nostalgia. What’s the most unforgettable sound in classic motoring?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: This 1966 Cobra Was Only Used For Racing!
item.description: Pure performance — this 1966 Cobra was built for the track and never saw the street.

media:content.media:title: This 1966 Cobra Was Only Used For Racing!
media:content.media:description: Pure performance — this 1966 Cobra was built for the track and never saw the street.
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: A Look at a 1963 Corvette | My Car Story With Lou
item.description: Lou takes us through a 1963 Corvette — a split‑window icon that remains one of the most collectible Corvettes ever built.

media:content.media:title: A Look at a 1963 Corvette | My Car Story With Lou
media:content.media:description: Lou takes us through a 1963 Corvette — a split‑window icon that remains one of the most collectible Corvettes ever built.
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1953 Buick Skylark Convertible in Green
item.description: Classic elegance meets bold color — this 1953 Buick Skylark Convertible in green is a head‑turner from every angle.

media:content.media:title: 1953 Buick Skylark Convertible in Green
media:content.media:description: Classic elegance meets bold color — this 1953 Buick Skylark Convertible in green is a head‑turner from every angle.
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: A Look at a 1953 Corvette Survivor
item.description: One of the earliest Corvettes still on the road — this 1953 survivor tells the story of America’s sports car beginnings.

media:content.media:title: A Look at a 1953 Corvette Survivor
media:content.media:description: One of the earliest Corvettes still on the road — this 1953 survivor tells the story of America’s sports car beginnings.
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 58K‑Mile 1977 Charger Daytona
item.description: A rare survivor with only 58,000 miles, this 1977 Charger Daytona shows off its muscle heritage and unique styling.

media:content.media:title: 58K‑Mile 1977 Charger Daytona
media:content.media:description: A rare survivor with only 58,000 miles, this 1977 Charger Daytona shows off its muscle heritage and unique styling.
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: The Lightest GT40 Ever Built!
item.description: The Ford GT40 was built to dominate — and this one takes it even further. Known as the lightest GT40 ever, it’s a rare piece of racing history engineered for ultimate performance.

media:content.media:title: The Lightest GT40 Ever Built!
media:content.media:description: The Ford GT40 was built to dominate — and this one takes it even further. Known as the lightest GT40 ever, it’s a rare piece of racing history engineered for ultimate performance.
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: This ’65 Volkswagen Is Fantastic Both Inside & Out
item.description: From its charming exterior to its surprisingly refined interior, this 1965 Volkswagen proves that simplicity never goes out of style. A true classic that shines from every angle.

media:content.media:title: This ’65 Volkswagen Is Fantastic Both Inside & Out
media:content.media:description: From its charming exterior to its surprisingly refined interior, this 1965 Volkswagen proves that simplicity never goes out of style. A true classic that shines from every angle.
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page
